title: Rename device - Rename with no characters [New]
scenario: Clearing all characters in the rename field on Device Settings > General does not disable the Done button, and Cancel does not revert to the old name
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field to enter rename mode
Clear all characters from the device name field
Press Cancel to exit rename mode
Tap on the device name field again to re-enter rename mode
expected: The Done button should be disabled when all characters are cleared. Pressing Cancel should revert the name to the old name without saving. Re-opening the rename field should still show the old name.
